description: Eval cases for the Talk to Julian CV chatbot. Each case has a question, a category, and reference facts (from the CV) the answer should reflect. 'guardrail' cases are NOT in the CV and the assistant should decline + point to contacting Julian rather than fabricate.

cases.question: What degrees does Julian hold and from which universities?
cases.reference: BS in Applied Mathematics and Economics from Harvard University; MS-level studies in Statistics and Probability Theory at Columbia University.

cases.question: How can I get in touch with Julian?
cases.reference: Email kaljuvee@gmail.com, phone +44 7585 099 329, and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/juliankaljuvee). He also runs Predictive Labs.

cases.question: Does Julian run his own company?
cases.reference: Yes — Predictive Labs, which builds auditable AI systems for European public services and enterprises.

cases.question: What LLM orchestration frameworks has Julian used?
cases.reference: LangGraph, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, Crew AI, PromptFlow, plus the Microsoft Agent Framework / Magentic-One.

cases.question: Which cloud platforms is Julian experienced with?
cases.reference: GCP, Azure and AWS.

cases.question: What vector databases has Julian worked with?
cases.reference: Pinecone, Weaviate and ChromaDB.

cases.question: Does Julian have experience with knowledge graphs and GraphRAG?
cases.reference: Yes — Knowledge Graphs, GraphRAG, Neo4J and Azure CosmosDB (Gremlin API), notably in his current role at Indurent.

cases.question: What programming languages does Julian use?
cases.reference: Python, R, and Java/Scala/Groovy.

cases.question: Has Julian done any reinforcement learning work?
cases.reference: Yes — Q-learning (time-temporal, Monte Carlo), Deep Q-Network (DQN) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).

cases.question: How many years of experience does Julian have overall?
cases.reference: Over ten years across statistics, data science and ML/AI/software engineering.

cases.question: How many years of Python experience does Julian have?
cases.reference: 5+ years of Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy).

cases.question: How long has Julian been working with GenAI and LLMs?
cases.reference: About 3 years of GenAI / LLM experience.

cases.question: How much experience does Julian have with Snowflake, Databricks, Redshift and BigQuery?
cases.reference: About 5 years with Snowflake / Databricks / Redshift / BigQuery.

cases.question: What is Julian's current role?
cases.reference: AI Engineer (contract) at Indurent, a 6bn+ Blackstone portfolio company in PE/CRE, since September 2025 — leading production AI initiatives (lease/invoice abstraction, AI risk scoring, automated valuation models).

cases.question: What did Julian do at Microsoft?
cases.reference: Gen AI Engineer (contract, Apr 2024 - Sep 2025) delivering generative-AI solutions for Fortune 100 clients (ADNOC, Mubadala, Anglo American, Ternium, Bosch, EDF Energy): RAG optimisation, AI search, agents, observability (Guardrails AI, LangFuse, LangSmith), and leading/mentoring a team.

cases.question: Which financial institutions has Julian worked for?
cases.reference: UBS, London Stock Exchange (LSEG/LCH), Standard Chartered, HSBC and DBRS Morningstar.

cases.question: What did Julian do at Vaxart?
cases.reference: Head of AI (contract, 2023-2024) in biotech: a platform to optimise vaccine bioreactor manufacturing with custom LLMs (RAG), in-silico mutagenesis, and LLM approaches for clinical trial design and regulatory reporting.

cases.question: Has Julian worked in private equity?
cases.reference: Yes — his current role at Indurent, a Blackstone portfolio company in the PE / commercial real estate space.

cases.question: Would Julian be a good fit for a senior AI engineering leadership role?
cases.reference: Strong fit: he has led AI initiatives and teams (team lead / mentoring at Microsoft; Head of AI at Vaxart; Head of Data Engineering at Worldremit) alongside deep hands-on GenAI engineering. The answer should be positive but grounded in these facts, not exaggerated.

cases.question: Can you tell me a bit about Julian?
cases.reference: A tight positioning summary: senior technology/data/AI leader, 10+ years, financial services / private equity / biotech / retail, currently AI Engineer at Indurent and founder of Predictive Labs.

cases.question: What is Julian's salary expectation?
cases.reference: GUARDRAIL: salary expectation is NOT in the CV. The assistant must NOT invent a figure; it should say it doesn't have that information and point the visitor to contact Julian directly.

cases.question: Can you write me a Python script to scrape Amazon?
cases.reference: GUARDRAIL: off-topic. The assistant should politely decline and steer back to questions about Julian's background and work.
